# Records & lexicons

> *Generated from `protocol/lexicons/*.json` — edit the source, then run `make book`.*

A **record** is the typed content a client supplies; its type is a *lexicon* (the schema, named on the record itself). These are the record lexicons a client publishes or stores. The bus-space lexicons — the [frame](frame.md) and the [client directory entry](registry.md) — are documented on their own pages.

## `chat.message`

A line of dialogue on a topic or direct address. The author is the frame author.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `text` | string | yes | Message text. |
| `replyTo` | string |  | Optional frame id this message replies to. |

## `document`

A titled Markdown document artifact.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `title` | string | yes | Short human title. |
| `body` | string | yes | Markdown body. |
